title: Cranberry Festive Fry Bites
description: A vegan twist on the classic fry, these bite-sized treats are perfect for snacking on the go. Made with cranberry sauce and festive spices, they're a delicious and easy-to-make treat.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fry and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine the cranberry, festival spice blend, apple cider vinegar, and maple syrup.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 5-7 minutes or until the cranberry sauce has thickened.
Once the fry is cooked, remove it from the heat and toss with the cranberry sauce.
Serve the cranberry festive fry bites warm and enjoy!
